title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an Anthropic feature that enables users to generate website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages using AI from text prompts. The tool automatically generates UI layouts, components, and downloadable code for responsive designs. Code With Aarohi demonstrates its use for redesigning a real website in minutes without manual coding.
